data.title: Microservices
data.description: Decomposed architecture where independent services are responsible for different functionalities.
data.technical_spec: Uses AWS infrastructure for scalable and reliable service deployment.

data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN)
data.description: Efficient delivery of content such as movies and shows using a distributed network of servers.
data.technical_spec: Primarily Akamai and Fastly for edge server caching.

data.title: Serverless Computing
data.description: On-demand resource allocation for specific tasks and workloads.
data.technical_spec: AWS Lambda used for event-driven compute tasks.

data.title: Cloud-native
data.description: Cloud-first infrastructure allowing for rapid scalability, easy updates, and cost-effectiveness.
data.technical_spec: Hosted on Amazon Web Services (AWS) offering redundancy and scalability.

data.title: RESTful APIs
data.description: Use of RESTful APIs to enable communication between client and server.
data.technical_spec: APIs follow REST principles to ensure stateless communication.
